prerequisites.value: Exotic Weapon Proficiency ( net ), base attack bonus +1.

description.value:
**Benefit:** You can treat a net as a one-handed melee reach weapon with a 10-foot reach. Further, you take no penalty on melee attack rolls for using an unfolded net, and you can use one full-round action or two move actions to fold a net.

**Normal:** A net is a ranged weapon that imposes a â4 penalty on ranged attack rolls if it is unfolded. Folding a net takes a proficient user 2 rounds.
